title: Afară, clanker! (robotul de curățenie)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Fetelor, nepotul mi-a trimis un robot care face curat singur. Un... clanker. Hai să-l cunoaștem.
shots.image_prompt: standing in a cozy rustic village kitchen holding a straw broom defensively across her body, looking down at the floor with playful suspicion and a comic frown, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she grips the straw broom and peers down at the floor with playful suspicion, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Se plimbă singur prin casă. Ca ginerele.
shots.image_prompt: a small round white robot vacuum gliding across a worn handwoven Romanian wool rug on a wooden floor, warm kitchen light, low close-up shot
shots.motion_prompt: the small round robot vacuum glides slowly across the woven rug and bumps gently into a chair leg, steady low camera, smooth coherent motion
shots.sfx: a small robot vacuum humming and whirring as it moves across a floor

shots.line: Vrea să-mi scaneze covorul. Covorul ăsta-i din '72! Nu și-a dat consimțământul!
shots.image_prompt: pointing the straw broom accusingly down toward the floor with an outraged but comic expression, in the cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she points the broom toward the floor and shakes it once with comic outrage, lively but coherent motion, stable framing

shots.image_prompt: the same small round white robot vacuum spinning in a confused little circle on the handwoven wool rug as a straw broom nudges toward it, warm kitchen light, low angle
shots.motion_prompt: the small robot vacuum spins in a confused little circle as the broom nudges it, lively coherent motion, steady low camera

sfx.prompt: a broom sweeping vigorously on a wooden floor with a robot whirring

shots.line: La mine se mătură cu mâna. Și cu credință.
shots.image_prompt: sweeping the wooden floor with the straw broom in steady strokes with a satisfied determined expression, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she sweeps the floor with the straw broom in steady strokes and nods with satisfaction, coherent rhythmic motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Robotul s-a dus să se încarce. De frică.
shots.image_prompt: the same small round white robot vacuum sitting still on its charging dock in a corner by a wooden wall, a single status light glowing, warm dim light, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: the small robot sits still on its dock with a softly pulsing status light, faint dust settling around it, very subtle coherent motion, steady camera

sfx.prompt: a soft electronic charging beep and gentle hum

shots.line: Nu-mi trebuie inteligență artificială. Am nepoți. Tot proști, dar ai mei.
shots.image_prompt: leaning on the straw broom with a warm triumphant smile, looking into the camera, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she leans on the broom and gives a warm triumphant smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă și voi măturați ca pe vremuri. Jos clankerii! Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving the straw broom in a cheerful goodbye with a big grin, cozy village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves the broom cheerfully and blows a kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
